authoritative_source: typed PDF action boundary plus current-run viewer readiness confirmation

readiness_contract.prepare: current run must still own the boundary key after preparation
readiness_contract.viewer_entry: viewer navigation is attempted only by the current run
readiness_contract.visibility: terminal success is emitted only after first visible/open readiness confirmation

duplicate_strategy: join_inflight for same boundary key inside ACTIVE_FLOW_MAX_TTL_MS
stale_invalidation: latestPreviewRunByKey rejects stale prepare/viewer/visibility commits; cleanup is run-id guarded
removed_speculative_step: stale PDF run can no longer navigate or clear a newer active flow after TTL replacement
